_readme: Append-only public benchmark scoreboard. Each row is one eval run. Substrate rows (no LLM, deterministic) are marked substrate:true and MUST NOT be quoted as live agent performance. Wet-eval rows (substrate:false) are appended by the T5.5 weekly CI workflow once it lands. Newest row first.

rows.notes: v1.4 substrate snapshot — deterministic CI gate, no LLM call. tokens / USD are projected by scripts/eval_telemetry.py from the 4-chars/token estimator and the illustrative 2026-05 public rate card; treat as an upper-bound budget, not a real bill. mtc fields are null because substrate runs in milliseconds and is not a meaningful end-to-end timing. Wet-eval rows from the T5.5 weekly job will replace these placeholders for live MTC.
